full_text:
Liu Fang (Ziqi) 劉放 (子棄)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Fang (劉放), styledZiqi (子棄), was born in Fangcheng county, Zhuo commandery. Recommended Cao Shuang as joint regent of Cao Fang. A brilliant writer, Han lineage. Liu Fang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Liu Fang lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
